transcend.4_1_kr:

체인 패시브의 WG 감소량 +1
transcend.4_1_zh:

连携被动技能的WG降低量+1

SKT_FIRST.name: Ninja Variety Combo
SKT_FIRST.name_jp: ニンジャのバラエティコンボ
SKT_FIRST.true_desc: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を2ターンの間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n该技能根据自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>等比提升伤害。

SKT_BURST_1.effect: Increases the chance to inflict Unbuffable by 50%
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 无法强化效果触发几率+50%

SKT_BURST_2.effect: Reduces Ninjutsu, Waterspout Technique Cooldown by 1 turn
SKT_BURST_2.effect_jp: 【忍法・竜巻の術】の\nスキルターン-1ターン
SKT_BURST_2.effect_zh: 忍者龙卷风之术冷却时间-1回合

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Changed to Enhanced Skill\nResets Ninjutsu, Waterspout Technique Cooldown
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 強化スキルに変更\n【忍法・竜巻の術】の\nスキルターン初期化
SKT_BURST_3.effect_kr: 강화 스킬로 교체\n인법 용오름의 술 쿨타임 초기화
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 转化为强化技能\n忍者龙卷风之术冷却时间重置

SKT_SECOND.name: Elf-Style Hand Seals
SKT_SECOND.true_desc: (Passive Effect) At the start of battle, grants <color=#28d9ed>A Ninja's Afterimage</color> to the caster. \n(Triggered Effect) When an ally is inflicted with a debuff, activates an <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>. Removes 1 <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> from all allies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>【ニンジャの残像】</color>を付与する。\n(発動効果)味方に弱体効果がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>が発動する。\n【迅速対応】:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を1個解除し、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_kr: (패시브 효과)전투 시작 시, 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>닌자의 잔상</color>을 부여합니다. \n(발동 효과)아군에게 약화 효과 적용 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n아군 전체 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 1개 해제하고, 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복불가</color>를 부여합니다.
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_zh:
(被动效果)战斗开始时,使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>忍者的残像</color>效果。
(触发效果)友军附带弱化效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>
效果。
解除全体友军的1个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,并有
<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: (Passive Effect) At the start of battle, grants <color=#28d9ed>A Ninja's Afterimage</color> to the caster. \n(Triggered Effect) When an ally is inflicted with a debuff, activates an <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>. Removes 1 <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> from all allies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.

<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.5: (Passive Effect) At the start of battle, grants <color=#28d9ed>A Ninja's Afterimage</color> to the caster. \n(Triggered Effect) When an ally is inflicted with a debuff, activates an <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>. Removes 1 <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> from all allies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>【ニンジャの残像】</color>を付与する。\n(発動効果)味方に弱体効果がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>が発動する。\n【迅速対応】:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を1個解除し、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: (패시브 효과)전투 시작 시, 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>닌자의 잔상</color>을 부여합니다. \n(발동 효과)아군에게 약화 효과 적용 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n아군 전체 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 1개 해제하고, 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color>동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복불가</color>를 부여합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh:
(被动效果)战斗开始时,使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>忍者的残像</color>效果。
(触发效果)友军附带弱化效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>
效果。
解除全体友军的1个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,并有
<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Ninjutsu, Waterspout Technique
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc: Attacks all enemies. When there is more than one target, ignores 30% of the target's Defense. When there is only one target, ignores <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> of the target's Defense and steals <color=#28d9ed>all</color> <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> and additionally increases proportional to missing Health.
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が単体ではない場合は防御力を30%無視する。対象が単体だった場合は防御力を<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>無視し、<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて</color>奪う。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPし、自分の残りHPが低いほどダメージが追加でUPする。
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 한명이 아니라면 방어력을 30% 무시합니다. 대상이 한 명이라면 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>모두</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>에 비례하여 피해가 증가하고, 잃은 체력에 비례하여 피해가 추가로 증가합니다.
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_zh: 攻击全体敌人。若目标并非只有1个,则无视\n30%的防御力;若目标只有1个,则无视<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的防御力,并夺取<color=#28d9ed>所有</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n该技能根据自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>等比提升伤害,并根据损失的生命值等比提升额外伤害。

3: +25% Ignored Defense to a single target
5: +25% Ignored Defense to a single target

SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.name: Chain Passive
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, recovers Action Points of the caster and the next Skill Chain caster by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、自分と次のチェーンスキル参加者のAPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>獲得する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 자신과 다음 스킬 체인 수행자의 AP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 회복합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,使自身和下一顺序的友军AP恢复<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, recovers Action Points of the caster and the next Skill Chain caster by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、自分と次のチェーンスキル参加者のAPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>獲得する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 자신과 다음 스킬 체인 수행자의 AP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 회복합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color> 상태로 만듭니다.

true_desc_levels.3_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,使自身和下一顺序的友军AP恢复<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.4: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, recovers Action Points of the caster and the next Skill Chain caster by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.4_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、自分と次のチェーンスキル参加者のAPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>獲得する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.4_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 자신과 다음 스킬 체인 수행자의 AP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 회복합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
true_desc_levels.4_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,使自身和下一顺序的友军AP恢复<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
